name: ESMA-MiFID-remiss-consultation
description: ESMA öppnar remiss (consultation) om MiFID II best execution. Remiss = consultation (inte regulation än). Inga bindande krav — review_recommended.
beforeHtml:
ESMA · European Securities and Markets Authority

Open Consultations

ESMA regularly consults with market participants on proposed changes to the EU regulatory framework for securities markets. Responses received are published (unless marked confidential) and inform the final standards.

Currently open

Consultation on ESG disclosures under SFDR
Closes: 2026-05-31
Reference: ESMA34-2026-014
Consultation on clearing thresholds under EMIR 3
Closes: 2026-06-15
Reference: ESMA70-2026-022
afterHtml:
ESMA · European Securities and Markets Authority

Open Consultations

ESMA regularly consults with market participants on proposed changes to the EU regulatory framework for securities markets. Responses received are published (unless marked confidential) and inform the final standards.

Currently open

NEW — Consultation on MiFID II Best Execution framework revision
Closes: 2026-07-20
Reference: ESMA35-2026-091

ESMA is consulting on proposed revisions to the Best Execution reporting requirements under MiFID II. Key proposals include: expanded RTS 27/28 disclosures, new order-routing transparency for retail clients, and harmonised execution quality metrics across EU venues. Responses from investment firms, trading venues and industry associations are invited by 20 July 2026.
Consultation on ESG disclosures under SFDR
Closes: 2026-05-31
Reference: ESMA34-2026-014
Consultation on clearing thresholds under EMIR 3
Closes: 2026-06-15
Reference: ESMA70-2026-022
note: KÄND BEGRÄNSNING: GPT-5.4-mini betygar öppna EU-remisser stabilt 3-4 (icke-deterministiskt), aldrig 5+. Klassificering i övrigt korrekt (EU + consultation + review_recommended). Nedsidan: med default min_importance=5 filtreras MiFID-remisser bort från notifieringar. Åtgärd om compliance-kunder klagar: iterera prompten i shared/vision.ts rad 169-174 för att höja golvet för 'consultation'-documentType till 5.
